title: calcaratolobelia knoblochii
intro: Calcaratolobelia knoblochii, also known as the knoblochii plant, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the bellflower family native to the island of Hawaii. The plant has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine, where its medicinal properties are attributed to its roots and leaves, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Calcaratolobelia knoblochii include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating various skin conditions and infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea infusions and tinctures, which are prepared by steeping the roots and leaves in hot water or a solvent, and are said to be effective in alleviating various health issues.
